productDisplayName: Timberland Women Femmes Brown Casual Shoes
description: Dress to work in style in the Pinkham Oxfords from timberland. With a suede and mesh upper, and a stylish synthetic leather patch, this shoe is designed to offer comfort and style at its best. Upper Suede and mesh upper for ultimate breathable comfort and style Synthetic leather toe box in a contrast colour for enhanced shoe life and style Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Wide mouth for ease of use Fabric inner lining for all-day comfort Padded anti-fatigue foam footbed with a fabric lining for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Midsole EVA midsole for all-day comfort and durability Outsole Durable grippy rubber outsole with leaf-shaped lugs throughout the forefoot and midfoot, and has semi-circular grooves on the big toe mound and heel for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe dust with a dry, clean cloth Use a suede brush Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
